name: Alaska Energy Metals Corp.
description: Alaska Energy Metals Corp. is a junior exploration company focused on delineating and developing large-scale, bulk-tonnage nickel deposits in North America. The company's flagship project is the Nikolai Nickel-Copper-Cobalt-PGE Project located in interior Alaska, USA. By targeting critical energy metals, Alaska Energy Metals aims to secure a domestic supply of nickel, copper, and cobalt essential for the transition to clean energy and electric vehicle battery manufacturing.
